description.overview: A rare piebald (tricolor) Yorkshire Terrier variety, the Biewer is a charming, playful companion. Their flowing tricolor coat and cheerful nature make them delightful pets.
description.history: The Biewer Terrier originated in Germany.
description.temperament: Known for being playful, lighthearted, amusing.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, silky, flowing coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A rare piebald (tricolor) Yorkshire Terrier variety, the Biewer is a charming, playful companion. Their flowing tricolor coat and cheerful nature make them delightful pets.
